sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67033" key="metaxarakthrismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεταχᾰρακτηρ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n67033.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">change of form</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">type</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0708.tlg001:pp.13,91" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ammon.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Diff.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">pp.13,91</biblScope> </bibl> V.</sense> </entryFree>
